entries.title: Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents
entries.description: Notion’s new developer platform lets teams connect AI agents, external data sources, and custom code directly into their workspace as the company pushes deeper into agentic productivity software.

entries.title: Musk’s xAI is running nearly 50 gas turbines unchecked at its Mississippi data center
entries.description: Gas turbines at xAI's Colossus 2 data center have drawn a lawsuit over the company's use of "mobile" gas turbines as power plants.

entries.title: What the jury will actually decide in the case of Elon Musk vs. Sam Altman
entries.description: Here's what the biggest tech court case of the year is all about.

entries.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceXAI has been bleeding staff since its merger

entries.title: OpenAI says Codex is coming to your phone
entries.description: The update gives users enhanced flexibility over how they can manage their workflows.

entries.title: What happens when AI starts building itself?
entries.description: Richard Socher's new $650 million startup wants to build an AI that can research and improve itself indefinitely — and he insists it will actually ship products.

entries.title: OpenAI is reportedly preparing legal action against Apple; it wouldn’t be the first partner to feel burned
entries.description: OpenAI is so frustrated with Apple over a ChatGPT integration that failed to deliver the subscribers and prominence it expected that the company is now actively exploring legal action against the iPho

entries.title: Clawdmeter turns your Claude Code usage stats into a tiny desktop dashboard
entries.description: A new open source gadget called Clawdmeter turns Claude Code usage stats into a tiny desktop dashboard for AI coding power users.

entries.title: Cerebras raises $5.5B, then stock pops $108%, in the first huge tech IPO of 2026
entries.description: A year ago, it looked like this day would never happen for Cerebras.

entries.title: Khosla Ventures is betting $10M on Ian Crosby, whose first startup, Bench, imploded
entries.description: Crosby is building Synthetic, a fully autonomous AI bookkeeping service for other startups.

entries.title: Cisco cuts nearly 4,000 jobs to spend more on AI, reports ‘record quarterly revenue’
entries.description: This is Cisco's latest layoff in recent years, while the company's chief executive touts record revenue and growth.

entries.title: Two weeks left: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27
entries.description: Your shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K equity-free funding is running out. Deadline to apply is May 27. Apply now.

entries.title: Wirestock raises $23M to supply creative multimodal data to AI labs
entries.description: The company pivoted to being a data provider in 2023 and now supplies datasets of images, videos, design assets, and gaming and 3D content to AI labs.

entries.title: Who decides what AI tells you? Campbell Brown, once Meta’s news chief, has thoughts
entries.description: "The conversation is sort of happening in Silicon Valley around one thing, and a totally different conversation is happening among consumers," Campbell Brown said at StrictlyVC.

entries.title: Clio’s $500M milestone arrives just as Anthropic ups the ante
entries.description: Legal tech startups, including Clio, which just hit $500 million in ARR, are seeing massive customer adoption.

entries.title: The OpenAI trial wraps up, and the Musk founder machine keeps spinning

entries.title: Silicon Valley’s vacationland needs a new energy provider just as AI is driving prices up
entries.description: Lake Tahoe, Silicon Valley's favorite ski spot, is about to get hit with higher energy prices as AI drives demand for electricity.

entries.title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT for personal finance, will let you connect bank accounts
entries.description: Once users connect their accounts, they will see a dashboard of their portfolio performance, spending, subscriptions, and upcoming payments.

entries.title: Runway started by helping filmmakers — now it wants to beat Google at AI
entries.description: AI video-generation startup Runway is betting that video generation is the path to world models. And that being an AI outsider is an advantage, not a liability.

entries.title: Osaurus brings both local and cloud AI models to your Mac
entries.description: Osaurus￼ combines local and cloud AI models in a Mac app that keeps users’ memory, files, and tools on their own hardware.
